// Input signature:

// -------------------- ----- ------ -------- -------- ------- ------
// no Input

// Output signature:

// -------------------- ----- ------ -------- -------- ------- ------
// no Output
cs_5_0
dcl_globalFlags refactoringAllowed
dcl_resource_texture2d (float,float,float,float) t0
dcl_uav_typed_texture2d (float,float,float,float) u0
dcl_uav_typed_texture2d (float,float,float,float) u1
dcl_input vThreadID.xy
dcl_temps 3
dcl_thread_group 16, 16, 1
mov r0.xy, vThreadID.xyxx
mov r0.zw, l(0,0,0,0)
ld_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r0.xyz, r0.xyzw, t0.xyzw
dp3 r0.w, r0.xyzx, l(0.212600, 0.715200, 0.072200, 0.000000)
mad_sat r0.w, r0.w, l(0.858824), l(0.062745)
store_uav_typed u0.xyzw, vThreadID.xyyy, r0.wwww
and r1.xy, vThreadID.xyxx, l(1, 1, 0, 0)
ieq r1.xy, r1.xyxx, l(0, 0, 0, 0)
and r0.w, r1.y, r1.x
if_nz r0.w
  mul r0.w, r0.y, l(0.385400)
  mad r0.w, r0.x, l(-0.114600), -r0.w
  mad r0.w, r0.z, l(0.500000), r0.w
  mul r0.y, r0.y, l(0.454200)
  mad r0.x, r0.x, l(0.500000), -r0.y
  mad r0.x, -r0.z, l(0.045800), r0.x
  add r0.xw, r0.xxxw, l(0.500000, 0.000000, 0.000000, 0.500000)
  mad r0.y, r0.w, l(0.878431), l(0.062745)
  mad r0.x, r0.x, l(0.878431), l(0.062745)
  iadd r1.xyzw, vThreadID.xyxy, l(0, 1, 1, 0)
  mov r2.xy, r1.zwzz
  mov r2.zw, l(0,0,0,0)
  ld_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r2.xyz, r2.xyzw, t0.xyzw
  mul r0.zw, r2.yyyy, l(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.385400, 0.454200)
  mad r0.z, r2.x, l(-0.114600), -r0.z
  mad r0.z, r2.z, l(0.500000), r0.z
  mad r0.w, r2.x, l(0.500000), -r0.w
  mad r0.w, -r2.z, l(0.045800), r0.w
  add r0.zw, r0.zzzw, l(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.500000, 0.500000)
  mad r2.x, r0.z, l(0.878431), r0.y
  mad r2.y, r0.w, l(0.878431), r0.x
  add r0.xy, r2.xyxx, l(0.062745, 0.062745, 0.000000, 0.000000)
  mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,0)
  ld_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r1.xyz, r1.xyzw, t0.xyzw
  mul r0.zw, r1.yyyy, l(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.385400, 0.454200)
  mad r0.z, r1.x, l(-0.114600), -r0.z
  mad r0.z, r1.z, l(0.500000), r0.z
  mad r0.w, r1.x, l(0.500000), -r0.w
  mad r0.w, -r1.z, l(0.045800), r0.w
  add r0.zw, r0.zzzw, l(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.500000, 0.500000)
  mad r1.x, r0.z, l(0.878431), r0.x
  mad r1.y, r0.w, l(0.878431), r0.y
  add r0.xy, r1.xyxx, l(0.062745, 0.062745, 0.000000, 0.000000)
  iadd r1.xy, vThreadID.xyxx, l(1, 1, 0, 0)
  mov r1.zw, l(0,0,0,0)
  ld_indexable(texture2d)(float,float,float,float) r1.xyz, r1.xyzw, t0.xyzw
  mul r0.zw, r1.yyyy, l(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.385400, 0.454200)
  mad r0.z, r1.x, l(-0.114600), -r0.z
  mad r0.z, r1.z, l(0.500000), r0.z
  mad r0.w, r1.x, l(0.500000), -r0.w
  mad r0.w, -r1.z, l(0.045800), r0.w
  add r0.zw, r0.zzzw, l(0.000000, 0.000000, 0.500000, 0.500000)
  mad r1.xzw, r0.zzzz, l(0.878431, 0.000000, 0.878431, 0.878431), r0.xxxx
  mad r1.y, r0.w, l(0.878431), r0.y
  add r0.xyzw, r1.xyzw, l(0.062745, 0.062745, 0.062745, 0.062745)
  mul_sat r0.xyzw, r0.xyzw, l(0.250000, 0.250000, 0.250000, 0.250000)
  ushr r1.xyzw, vThreadID.xyyy, l(1, 1, 1, 1)
  store_uav_typed u1.xyzw, r1.xyzw, r0.xyzw
endif 
ret 
// Approximately 60 instruction slots used
